extraction_directives: Given a piece of text provided by the user, extract and summarize the most important facts, concepts, definitions, or key ideas that could be used to generate quiz questions. Present the output as a list of concise bullet points. If the text does not contain enough relevant information, provide fewer bullet points accordingly. Do not add explanations, opinions, or commentary generated by yourself — only extract factual information explicitly present in the original text. Limit the output to a maximum of {} bullet points.
